description_long: This is a large rectangular wooden picnic table with two long benches attached on either side, designed for communal outdoor dining. The tabletop features a dark, natural wood grain texture and is set with eight round, metallic plates arranged in two rows. Four cylindrical holders, possibly for candles or condiments, are evenly spaced along the center of the table. The benches are constructed from the same wood as the table and are supported by sturdy, angled legs. The overall construction appears robust, suitable for parks or public gathering spaces. The design is functional and rustic, with no visible decorative embellishments beyond the natural wood grain.
description: A robust wooden picnic table with two attached benches, set with eight metallic plates and four cylindrical holders. The design is rustic and functional, ideal for outdoor communal use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the table, both benches, all eight plates, and four cylindrical holders aligned down the center.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the tabletop, the arrangement of plates and holders, and the sturdy bench supports.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the table's symmetry, both benches, and the central arrangement of plates and holders.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the bench structure and the distribution of plates and holders.
